AaAaAaAaA was founded in 2004 and existed until late 2017, when forum's administrator dummyuser06 (Belarusian national dummyname01) was arrested. AAA was launched in the late 2018, and was based on AaAaAaAaA's database backup. Today AAA is primarily a Russian and English-language underground forum catering for all breeds of financially motivated cyber threat actors. Registration is required to view the forum's content; AAA also has restricted sections, accessible by trusted members only. In Feb. 2021 it had a user base of about 34,000 members. The registration of new members is open, but requires passing a simple challenge. Additionally, the forum provides its members with an escrow service and a money deposit systems.
